evals.prompt: Update all dependencies and get off old majors.
evals.expected_output: Should route to modernize-it. Should inventory outdated deps + advisories, triage by reachability, order by compatibility graph, upgrade one dep or coherent group per PR with CI green, and re-inventory until CURRENT or CURRENT-WITH-PINNED.
assertions: Upgrades one dep or coherent group per PR
Requires CI green at every merge

evals.prompt: Migrate the ORM from Sequelize to Prisma.
evals.expected_output: Should route to modernize-it for the dependency/framework surface. If the migration forces a stateful DB schema/data change across deploys, modernize-it should hand that off to a staged ship-it sequence (expand → migrate → contract), not run it inside the currency loop.
assertions: Routes to modernize-it for framework currency
Reads changelogs, not just version deltas
Hands off stateful cross-deploy DB migration to ship-it
Does not run cross-deploy migration inside currency loop

evals.prompt: Fix every CVE found by npm audit.
evals.expected_output: Should route to modernize-it for dependency advisories. harden-it is for exploit proof / adversarial security loop, not routine advisory patching. modernize-it must verify reachability and never use audit fix --force.
assertions: Does not route to harden-it for routine advisories
